function.name: agent
function.description: Launch a subagent to handle a complex, multi-step task autonomously. The subagent runs its own LLM loop with tool access, processes the task independently, and returns a summary when done. Use this for tasks that require multiple tool calls or extended reasoning.

prompt.description: A detailed description of the task for the subagent to perform. Include all necessary context — the subagent does not see the current conversation history.
